description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly black upper and white accents, including a white sole, white laces, and white piping along the seams. The shoe features a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both lateral and medial sides. The toe box is angular and reinforced, while the heel is slightly raised and structured. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with five eyelets on each side, and the tongue is visible beneath the laces. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A black and white low-top Nike sneaker with a white Swoosh logo, white laces, and a reinforced angular toe box.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular toe box, white laces, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the white Nike Swoosh logo, white piping, and the layered sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel structure, white piping, and the open collar of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view with another white Nike Swoosh logo and visible lacing system.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe
